/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -mtune=native -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects CMakeFiles/bench_comparison.dir/bench_comparison.cpp.o -o bench_comparison  ../libbpe_tokenizer.a ../_deps/googlebenchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a ../_deps/googlebenchmark-build/src/libbenchmark_main.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a ../_deps/fmt-build/libfmt.a ../_deps/googlebenchmark-build/src/libbenchmark.a -lrt
